_meta.description: Autonomous safety classification for all active Jarvis skills

tiers.0: Safe for fully autonomous claude -p (read-only analysis, no external writes)
tiers.1: Safe for autonomous with local file output only
tiers.2: Requires gating -- modifies git, TELOS, or external systems
tiers.3: Human-in-loop required -- interactive confirmations, identity changes

create-image.notes: Writes image files locally via Gemini

teach.notes: Writes lesson files, may write signals

absorb.notes: --quick mode safe; --deep queues TELOS proposals as PENDING

autoresearch.notes: Creates branches, commits in worktree -- controlled loop

deep-audit.notes: --evaluate is read-only; --onboard may auto-fix Tier 1 findings

learning-capture.notes: User-only -- runs in calling session, not delegated. SKILL.md autonomous_safe: false; disable-model-invocation: true (2026-04-27). Was tier 2 until reconciled.

security-audit.notes: May git rm --cached or add .gitignore entries

self-heal.notes: Max 3 heal cycles, reverts if unresolved

synthesize-signals.notes: Writes synthesis docs, moves signal files

capture-recording.notes: Uploads to Gemini API, modifies MUSIC.md

commit.notes: Modifies git state, requires message approval

create-pattern.notes: Creates new skills, updates CLAUDE.md registry

delegation.notes: Interactive session routing -- dispatcher IS the autonomous equivalent

implement-prd.notes: Builds code with multiple approval gates

project-orchestrator.notes: Interactive session orchestration -- dispatcher handles autonomous task routing

workflow-engine.notes: Interactive skill chaining -- dispatcher worker prompt + ISC is the autonomous equivalent
